author: lathomas
body:
#### PR description:
The PR update the list of MET filters run in the global boolean Flag_METFilters. It also disables the recomputation on MINIAOD of some filter decisions that already exist. 

#### PR validation:
runTheMatrix.py -l limited -i all --ibeos
is run successfully
title: Update recommended list of MET filters, disable recomputation on MINIAOD
